## How tested
<!-- Commands you ran. Smoke tests must pass. -->
- [ ] `node test/smoke.js` (or `npm test`) is green
- [ ] `node -c` on changed scripts
- [ ] Tested on: <!-- Windows / macOS / Linux -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Dependency-free (plain Node)
- [ ] Cross-platform (no shell string interpolation; `path.join`, `os.homedir()`)
- [ ] No personal data / secrets
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` …)
